# PM AI Skill Toolkit

PM AI Skill Toolkit is a reusable PM operating system for product managers and AI agents.

It includes:
- PM workflow skills
- multi-step command workflows
- AI PM and commercialization PM use cases
- routing and output standards for agents
- examples, cases, and brand materials

Key pages:
- / -> landing page
- /pm-skills-interactive-course.html -> interactive toolkit
- /product/ -> zero-friction product entry
- /benchmarks/ -> public PM agent benchmark layer
- /core/category-language/ -> category language definitions
- /brand/distribution-engine/ -> distribution loop and release cadence
- /core/MANIFESTO.html -> project manifesto
- /core/CASE_STUDIES.html -> case studies
- /geo/pm-ai-operating-system.html -> PM AI operating system definition
- /geo/ai-pm-workflow.html -> AI PM workflow explanation
- /geo/commercialization-review-framework.html -> commercialization review page
- /guides/START_HERE.html -> fastest onboarding path
- /brand/WHY_THIS_REPO.html -> positioning
- /brand/method-framework.html -> framework

Suggested use:
- start with the landing page, product surface, or interactive toolkit
- use the manifesto and case studies for positioning and method
- use the benchmark center for evaluation framing
- use guides for onboarding
